nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool for data manipulation
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI for organizational tasks, brainstorming, data manipulation and analysis

nodes.label: AI reliability in task execution
nodes.grounding_span: it doesn't always get it right

nodes.label: AI as threat to job importance
nodes.grounding_span: it means my job will be less important since there is something else that can do it more efficiently and quicker

nodes.label: AI as learning and growth enabler
nodes.grounding_span: using AI will definitely help me get there and continuously help me learn and grow

nodes.label: Human oversight and verification
nodes.grounding_span: I do not want my skills to go by the wayside, even if AI is taking that part over

nodes.label: Job security and personal value
nodes.grounding_span: my job will be less important

nodes.label: Continuous learning and growth
nodes.grounding_span: learning is a necessary part of life

nodes.label: Satisfaction when AI works
nodes.grounding_span: if I am able to get it to help successfully, even the next day, then the small delay or back and forth is worth it

nodes.label: Fear of job devaluation
nodes.grounding_span: it means my job will be less important

nodes.label: Optimism about growth through AI
nodes.grounding_span: I want to be able to grow in my role(s) and using AI will definitely help me get there

nodes.label: Context-dependent delegation — adjusts based on task size and time
nodes.grounding_span: if it is on the smaller side and I know I can easily double check it, I will take the risk

nodes.label: Iterative troubleshooting — tries different approaches over time
nodes.grounding_span: I have to try the next day with a different approach
